playerGoal: Outgrow every facility through manufacturing mastery, then build a large-scale American manufacturing campus.
moveRule: A facility move requires quality, delivery, process mastery, and capital. Production volume alone never unlocks the next building.

facilities.name: The Inherited Bay
facilities.fantasy: Turn an almost-empty rented bay into a shop capable of shipping dependable work.
facilities.pressure: The first CNC, material staging, and inspection area compete for the same limited floor space.

facilities.name: The Job Shop
facilities.fantasy: Build departments, hire the first team, and manage multiple jobs at once.
facilities.pressure: More machines create scheduling, tooling, inspection, and handoff failures.

facilities.name: The Connected Plant
facilities.fantasy: Operate machining cells, quality, shipping, maintenance, and planning as one visible system.
facilities.pressure: The player can no longer personally see every machine or handoff.

facilities.name: The Smart Factory
facilities.fantasy: Design automated cells, controlled tooling, repeatable handoffs, and disciplined production flow.
facilities.pressure: Automation multiplies good processes and bad processes equally.

facilities.name: The Lights-Out Complex
facilities.fantasy: Run coordinated production halls with pallet systems, cobots, AMRs, and unattended night shifts.
facilities.pressure: Reliability, maintenance, material flow, and recovery planning become existential.

facilities.name: American Titan Campus
facilities.fantasy: Lead a multi-building manufacturer serving aerospace, energy, robotics, and American industry.
facilities.pressure: Build leaders, preserve knowledge, develop apprentices, and keep a vast organization aligned.
facilities.endState: The apprentice becomes the mentor for the next generation while the campus continues operating.
